candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Researchers were interested in the effect of temperature on the respiration rate of crickets. Three chambers were prepared and kept at three different temperatures. A cricket was placed in each chamber. The $CO_2$ levels in the chamber were recorded at 0 minutes, 5 minutes, and 10 minutes to assess the changing levels of $CO_2$ over time. This process was repeated 50 times at each temperature. The results are indicated in the figure. Identify which temperature was associated with the highest respiration rate in the crickets.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 研究人员探究温度对板球呼吸速率的影响。设置三个恒温腔室,分别维持不同温度。每个腔室内放置一个板球,测量腔室内二氧化碳浓度在0分钟、5分钟和10分钟时的变化,以评估二氧化碳浓度随时间的变化情况。在每个温度下重复该过程50次。结果如图所示。请确定与板球呼吸率最高相关的温度值。
metadata.explanation_zh: 在35°C时,呼吸速率达到最高,这从该温度下曲线斜率最大(表示二氧化碳浓度随时间增加的速率最快)可以得到证实。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The question clearly asks which temperature produced the highest cricket respiration rate, and the table image provides the needed CO2-over-time data. The image is readable, and the answer 35 is inferable from the largest increase in CO2 over time.
